_note: T05 — reauthentication OTP flow. MUST BE VALIDATED IN B3 against a real Inbucket capture. Fields marked with _test_notes are assumptions -- confirm before use in production.

email_data._test_notes: token: the OTP code the user types. Length set by otp_length in config (8 locally). Actual production length may differ. token_hash: expected to be absent (user types code, not clicks link). Confirm both with Inbucket in B3.
